prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次依次为约 1975→11328→3127→1622→1652 名；2022 年出现明显断档（11328 名），2023 年回升至 3127 名后，2024–2025 年稳定在 1622–1652 名区间，近两年波动幅度约 30 名，2025 年基准位次约 1652 名；该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021 年 28 人、2022 年 25 人、2023 年 26 人、2024 年 26 人、2025 年 26 人；2026 年计划 22 人，较 2025 年减少 4 人（缩招约 15.4%），招生名额缩减将加剧竞争激烈程度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 苏州大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名近年稳定在第 40–46 名（2026 年约第 46 名），属中上水平全国性综合大学，在青海省考生中具有较高认可度；2026 年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及一起校园安全事件（男大学生恶意利用女同学照片），可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制作用；抖音热度排名第 46（较热），短视频平台曝光度处于中上水平，对报考关注度有一定正向拉动。历史投档异常记录中未见苏州大学出现明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，苏州 大学拥有体育学 A-、药学 A- 两个 A- 级学科；招生专业中药学、材料类等与优势学科关联，临床医学、计算机类等热门专业虽未获 A 类评级但社会需求旺盛。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，临床医学、口腔医学保持偏热，上述专业均为苏州大学在青海省理科（物理类）招生主力方向，高热度将吸引更多考生报考；生化环材、土木建筑类明显劝退， 相关专业报考热度下降。青海省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 48000 人（较 2025 年总人数 47669 略有增加），按近年物理类占比约 63.9% 估算，2026 年物理类考生约 30672 人，较 2025 年 30457 人小幅增长，竞争基数扩大。青海省理科/物理类本科一批/本科批分数线从 2021 年 330 分逐步升至 2025 年 350 分，整体呈小幅上升趋势，反映整体竞争环境趋紧；苏州大学位于江苏省苏州市，属长三角经济发达地区，对西部省份考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在青海省 招生占比极低（近年约 0.3%–0.4%），跨省报考热度受地域偏好影响较大，东部发达城市高校在青海省持续受追捧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1652 名、2026 年招生计划缩减 15.4%（缩招使位次前移）、青海省物理类考生小幅增加（竞争加剧使位次后移）、工科及医学类专业社会热度持续高位（吸引更多高分考生报考）、学校声誉偏负面（轻微抑制 报考热情）等多重因素，缩招带来的竞争加剧效应与考生增加、专业热度等因素部分叠加，预计 2026 年最低录取位次较 2025 年小幅前移（更易进），预测最低位次约 1550 名，波动区间 1271–1829 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1975, 11328, 3127, 1622, and 1652 respectively; a significant gap occurred in 2022 (11328), rebounded to 3127 in 2023, and stabilized between 1622 and 1652 in 2024–2025, with a fluctuation range of about 30 places in the last two years, and a baseline ranking of approximately 1652 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province: 28 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 26 in 2024, 26 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 22, a decrease of 4 from 2025 (a reduction of about 15.4%), and the reduction in enrollment will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been stable at around 40–46 in recent years (approximately 46th in 2026), making it a mid-to-upper level national comprehensive university with high recognition among Qinghai Province examinees; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving a campus safety incident (a male student maliciously using female classmates' photos), which may have a slight inhibitory effect on some examinees' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 46th (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at a mid-to-upper level, providing some positive pull for application attention. No obvious gap signals have been seen in historical admission anomaly records for Soochow University; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Soochow University has two A- level disciplines: Physical Education A- and Pharmacy A-; among the enrollment majors, Pharmacy, Materials, etc., are related to advantageous disciplines, while popular majors like Clinical Medicine and Computer Science, though not rated A, have strong social demand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain relatively hot; these majors are the main directions for Soochow University's science (physics category) enrollment in Qinghai Province, and high popularity will attract more examinees to apply; majors like Biology, Chemistry, Environmental Science, Materials, Civil Engineering, and Architecture are clearly discouraged, with declining application popularity. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination participants in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 48,000 (slightly increased from 47,669 in 2025); based on the recent physics category proportion of about 63.9%, the estimated number of physics category examinees in 2026 is about 30,672, a slight increase from 30,457 in 2025, expanding the competition base. The first batch/batch line for science/physics category in Qinghai Province has gradually risen from 330 in 2021 to 350 in 2025, showing a slight upward trend, reflecting a tightening overall competitive environment; Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, in the economically developed Yangtze River Delta region, which has strong regional appeal for examinees from western provinces; the university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is very low (about 0.3%–0.4% in recent years), and cross-provincial application enthusiasm is greatly influenced by regional preferences, with universities in developed eastern cities continuing to be sought after in Qinghai Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1652, the 15.4% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (which moves the ranking forward), the slight increase in physics category examinees in Qinghai Province (which moves the ranking backward), the sustained high social popularity of engineering and medical majors (attracting more high-scoring examinees to apply), and the slightly negative university reputation (slightly suppressing application enthusiasm), the competition intensification effect from the enrollment reduction partially overlaps with factors like the increase in examinees and major popularity. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward (easier to enter) compared to 2025, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 1550 and a fluctuation range of 1271–1829.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 480, 1661, 561, 425, and 479 respectively; a significant gap occurred in 2022 (1661), while other years fluctuated narrowly within the 425–561 range. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 479, with a fluctuation range of about 136 over the past four years (excluding the 2022 anomaly), showing overall stability. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Qinghai Province: 5 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 7 in 2024, 7 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 11, an increase of 4 (about 57.1%) compared to 2025, significantly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Soochow University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking on the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has been stable at around 40–46 in recent years (about 46th in 2026), with strong appeal among liberal arts candidates in Qinghai Province. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a campus safety incident, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 46th (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at an upper-middle level. No significant gaps have been observed in historical admission anomalies for Soochow University. The university has two A- disciplines: Physical Education and Pharmacy. Although liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Ideological and Political Education do not have A-level ratings, they are stable foundational humanities and social sciences fields with social demand.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language/Literature have been consistently recommended as hot from 2023 to 2024; teacher training/education fields show divergence and wait-and-see attitudes, but publicly funded teacher training directions remain attractive; Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged, with declining application interest. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance exam is about 48,000. Based on the recent history category proportion of about 36.1%, the estimated number of history category candidates in 2026 is about 17,328, a slight increase from 17,212 in 2025, with a basically stable competition base. The first batch/bachelor batch cutoff scores for liberal arts/history category in Qinghai Province fluctuate narrowly within the 405–411 range, overall stable. Soochow University is located in Suzhou, Jiangsu Province, a developed region in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal for liberal arts candidates from western provinces. The university's enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is extremely low, and cross-province application enthusiasm is significantly influenced by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 479, the significant 57.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 (which shifts rankings backward and greatly alleviates competition), the basically stable number of history category candidates, and the high popularity of liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language, the dominant factor is the competition relief from expansion. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will be significantly lower than in 2025 (easier to enter), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 663, and a fluctuation range of 544–782.
